summary: Spot/Futures Wallet Split feature testing completed. All features working correctly: Transfer Modal UI, Transfer API (Spot↔Futures), Wallet page shows separate balances, Futures page shows Futures Balance.

issues: Chart shows 'Failed to load chart' - minor issue, not related to transfer feature

passed_tests: Transfer Modal opens with correct UI (From/To/Coin/Amount/Max button)
Available balance shows correctly based on selected 'From' account
Max button fills entire available balance
Swap button switches From and To accounts
Transfer API works: Spot to Futures
Transfer API works: Futures to Spot
Transfer API rejects insufficient Spot balance
Transfer API rejects insufficient Futures balance
Wallet page shows separate Spot and Futures balances with colored indicators
Futures page shows Futures Balance instead of Spot balance
Transfer summary appears when amount is entered
context_for_next_testing_agent: Spot/Futures Wallet Split feature fully tested and working. Transfer API at /api/wallet/transfer with directions 'spot_to_futures' and 'futures_to_spot'. Wallet page shows Spot (blue indicator) and Futures (green indicator) balances. Transfer Modal has all required UI elements with data-testid attributes.
